MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WEDNESDAY-JUNE-17-2009: Hanna Leung, counsel for Plaintiff Suae Chang, who is also present; Barry Brickley, counsel for Defendant Barry Brickley, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 2445 - 20th Avenue, City and County of San Francisco, State of California. The JUNE-22-2009 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Donald Sullivan, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
